name: GetReplies
description: Agentic AI platform for B2B sales and marketing teams. Pre-built AI agents handle prospect qualification, personalized outreach, campaign optimization, and lifecycle engagement across email, LinkedIn, and phone. Focuses on outcomes rather than tasks.
notes: Purpose-built for agentic sales workflows. Library of pre-built agents removes guesswork. Outcome-focused rather than task-focused—agents manage full lifecycle engagement.
